title: diaginosko #1231
definition:
1) to distinguish, i.e. to know accurately, ascertain exactly
 2) in a legal sense, to examine, determine, decide
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to distinguish, i.e. to know accurately, ascertain exactly
 2) in a legal sense, to examine, determine, decide
